title: Carrot Quest
shortDescription: Find a path to the carrot through rocks, wood, ice and water.
description: Reach the carrot. Push pushable tiles (wood, metal crate) by walking into them — they slide one cell in your direction. Solid tiles (rock, wood, metal crate) block movement; rock breaks when pushed with a pickaxe, wood burns when pushed with a torch. Ice is slippery — you and pushable items slide until you hit something solid; carrying a torch onto ice melts it into water, carrying a pickaxe onto ice shatters it into empty ground. Water is walkable but any item you carry is lost when you step in; pushing a metal crate into water turns the cell into a walkable bridge. Portals teleport you between paired tiles.
